description_long: This recliner features a sturdy wooden frame with a natural finish, supporting thick, gray upholstered cushions on the seat and backrest. The armrests are angular and crafted from the same wood as the frame, providing a minimalist yet robust appearance. The backrest is divided into two distinct padded sections, offering both head and lumbar support for enhanced comfort. The seat cushion is broad and plush, inviting relaxation, while the overall silhouette is sleek and modern. No visible reclining mechanism or footrest is present, suggesting a fixed reclined angle. The upholstery is plain, with no visible patterns or embellishments, emphasizing a clean and contemporary design.
description: A modern recliner with a natural wood frame and plain gray upholstered cushions, featuring segmented backrest padding and angular wooden armrests.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the seat and backrest, highlighting the segmented cushions and the open wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the reclined angle, the thickness of the cushions, and the continuous wooden frame supporting the seat and back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain gray back panel and the wooden frame enclosing the backrest, with no visible mechanisms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the reclined profile, segmented backrest, and the angular wooden armrest structure.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are angular, made of exposed light wood, and lack any visible padding, giving a minimalist and sturdy appearance.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is divided into two padded sections: a headrest and a lower back support, separated by a visible seam.
